title: Aduxx dcreward
description:
🏆 Discord Reward Plugin
Discord Reward is a lightweight Minecraft plugin designed for servers that want to reward players for joining or verifying with their Discord community. Simple, fast, and fully customizable.

✨ Features
✅ GUI-based reward system
body:
🌀 ADUXX-DCREWARD – Discord Reward Integration Plugin
Bring your Minecraft and Discord communities together with seamless reward claiming!

🎁 ADUXX-DCREWARD is a  modern Paper plugin that lets players claim in-game rewards based on Discord verification or activity. Perfect for Minecraft servers that want to link perks or bonuses with their Discord engagement.

💡 Features
🔗 Easy linking between Discord and Minecraft accounts

📦 Customizable reward system (items, commands, etc.)

🧩 Intuitive GUI with claim status:

✅ Green check if the player already claimed

❌ Red cross if the reward is still available

🛡️ Built with JDA 5 and shaded for plugin compatibility (no external setup needed)

🔍 Uses modern Paper API (1.21+ supported)

⚙️ Setup
Drop the plugin into your plugins/ folder.

Configure your bot token & reward settings in the config file.

Add the /nagroda command to your server help if desired.

🛠️ Requirements
Java 21+

PaperMC (or compatible fork)
plugin showcase: https://youtu.be/xvlAip0Onw8]
